⚓

Take Sovereignty With You

Your business data is already inside this vessel. Download it — yours forever.

This vessel is free. No subscription. No account. No permission required. When you open the downloaded file, all your data will be there — transferred automatically.

If it has value to you, a voluntary contribution keeps the ecosystem alive and funds continued development for communities across the Caribbean and beyond.
🌱 New evolutions arrive with each version. Your continued stewardship funds the next vessel, the next capsule, the next community. Every contribution is recorded in this vessel's Stewardship Record.

Contributions are processed securely via Stripe. Each is recorded in your vessel's Company Profile.
"The vessel is complete. The knowledge is embedded. The sovereignty is yours."
